steps.title: Recognize the shared characteristic
steps.content: Both Cane and Billy Budd, Sailor entered the public domain within a year of each other—in 2019 and 2020. To emphasize this similarity, the correct choice should group the works together and highlight what they have in common.

steps.title: Select the choice that groups and emphasizes the shared trait
steps.content: Choice B groups both works together with “and” and emphasizes their shared experience: both “recently entered the public domain.” Choices A, C, and D either use contrast language, isolate one work, or emphasize a difference in literary form. That matches choice B — B is correct.
